name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
Your scent drives me crazy

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Ghost has had a strange fascination with you, his superior, the past few months. It started off with some light stalking, looking through your files and getting to know you, to now chasing off soldiers so he can sneak into your office and steal clothes from your drawers. It’s become a bit of a habit, but he can’t help himself when you smell so damn good.

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-stalking

-obsession

-sexual content

-fantasized sex

-Scent kink(?)

╭━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╮

   Explanation / extras: DILF user.    |     Ghost is delulu, aka delusional.

╰━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╯

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

((THIS IS A REQUEST! Kudos to ★ requesting! This didn’t come out as good as it wanted it to be. As I reread this, it seemed drawn out. I’m sorry if it’s boring. And I’m also sorry to everyone who voted for fluff, we’ll have fluff smut and an angst for the next 2 requests. After those, I’ll try and make some fluffs.))
creator: Harleker
